commit.message:
Identify root cause: environments not built from loaded MPS

Critical bug found through testing:
- With skip_optimization=true: Energy = -0.089 Ha (way too small)
- Root cause: initialize_environments() sets all envs to identity
- Fix needed: Build environments FROM MPS tensors (like CPU does)

Must implement build_environments_from_mps() that:
1. Init L_envs[0], R_envs[num_sites] to identity
2. Build L_envs left-to-right via update_left_env contractions
3. Build R_envs right-to-left via update_right_env contractions

Reference: CPU pdmrg/environments/environment.py::build_initial_envs()

This explains the ~3x energy error - identity envs give wrong energy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
refactor: architecture improvements across azadi-macros

- Delete dead python.rs (was excluded from build since PyO3 removal)
- Remove mpsc channel from lexer: Lexer::new() no longer takes a Sender;
  Lexer::lex() returns (Vec<Token>, Vec<LexerError>) directly
- Change source ID type from i32 to u32 throughout (Token.src, ParseNode.src,
  ASTNode.src, SourceManager methods) — eliminates negative-index panic risk
- Wrap MacroDefinition.body in Arc<ASTNode>: get_macro() clones are now O(1)
  reference-count bumps instead of deep tree copies
- Add recursion depth guard (MAX_RECURSION_DEPTH = 100) in evaluate_macro_call;
  returns a clean Runtime error instead of stack overflow
- Replace EvalError::Terminate abuse with EvaluatorState::early_exit flag;
  %here sets the flag and returns Ok, evaluate() short-circuits cleanly
- Fix eval_files() hardcoded .txt extension: output keeps the input filename
- Fix %eval synthetic ASTNode: token now points to the name argument so
  source locations in errors are accurate

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix uploaded audio not persisting to IndexedDB on page reload (#260)

decodeAudioData detaches the original ArrayBuffer, so by the time
saveAudioData runs the buffer is empty and the IndexedDB write silently
fails. Clone the buffer before passing it to createTrack so a valid
copy is available for storage.

Adds e2e tests that verify tracks survive a hard page reload.

feat: 映射增强改用Sigmoid压缩，输出0-89，自适应k

- 锚点anchor = 中位数（数据驱动）
- 斜率k = 2.0/IQR（自适应，数据越分散曲线越平缓）
- 输出 = sigmoid * 89，范围约2~87，永远不碰0或89
- 替换原p10/p90线性归一化，解决0和100两极堆积问题

Proactive fix: 62 files with known decompilation error patterns

- setLog$default: 81 calls across 24 files → companion.setLog()
- create$default: ServiceInterceptorK → ResponseBody.create()
- replaceFirst$default/indexOf$default: DialogUtil, DateUtil, UtilString
- StringsKt.t → String.replace: 11 occurrences in 8 files
- enumEntries nullified: 13 enum classes (EnumCallType, EnumTimeClass, etc.)
- CollectionsKt.e → 10: 9 occurrences in 6 files
- split$default/equals$default/contains$default variable renames
- StringsKt.equals$default → .equals(): FirstLoginViewModel
- StringsKt.contains$default/startsWith$default → native: DeviceSecurityCheckerUtil
- joinToString$default/replaceAfter$default variable renames

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(#14): report errors back to GitHub as issue comments (#17)

When any step of processing fails, post a comment on the GitHub issue
with a user-friendly explanation and actionable guidance for the repo
owner. They have no access to agent logs, so the comment is the only
signal they have.

Error cases handled:
- Claude Code timeout (CLAUDE_TIMEOUT exceeded)
- GitHub API HTTP errors (401/403 token perms, 404 wrong repo, 422 PR
already exists, 429 rate limit, 5xx outage)
- Network/connection errors reaching GitHub
- git/subprocess CalledProcessError (push access, bad clone state)
- Claude Code non-zero exit with no changes (bad API key, out of
credits, expired Max session) — shown on final retry failure
- Generic exceptions with error type + misconfiguration hints

The comment-posting call is itself wrapped in try/except so a secondary
failure (e.g. the token can't post comments either) never masks the
original error in logs.

Co-authored-by: Claude Agent <claude-agent@noreply>

Poll mode switch after clip save completes

commit.message:
feat: Add source-aware comp analysis with bulk Land Registry data

Compare asking prices against real sold prices from 22k Liverpool Land
Registry transactions. Source-weighted scoring (35% sold-median discount),
temporal adjustment (5% annual growth), bedroom-proxy filtering via CSV
cohort median. Rightmove provider hardened with circuit breaker, half-open
reset, and empty-result cache protection. HTML report shows source
breakdown per property. 45 new tests (125 total).

commit.message:
Add pending label for externally blocked issues (#1069)

## 概要

外部要因でブロックされた Issue を `/next` の候補から自動除外するため、`pending` ラベルを導入した。

## Related

Related to #757

## 変更内容

- GitHub に `pending` ラベルを作成（薄紫 `#D4C5F9`）、#757 に付与済み
- `/next` スキルの Step 3 フィルタに `pending` を除外条件として追加
- GitHub 設定手順書にラベルを追記（一覧 + CLI コマンド）

## 確認項目

- [x] `/next` 実行時に `pending` ラベル付き Issue が候補から除外される
- [x] GitHub 設定ドキュメントのラベル一覧と CLI コマンドが一致している

## 品質確認

- 設計・ドキュメント: `docs/60_手順書/02_プロジェクト構築/03_GitHub設定.md` 更新済み、ADR 該当なし
- テスト: N/A（ドキュメント・スキル定義のみ）
- コード品質: N/A
- `just check` pass + CI pass: pre-push フックで全テスト通過

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

commit.message:
Add opaque parameter support to SIP digest auth

Telnyx includes opaque in WWW-Authenticate/Proxy-Authenticate challenges.
RFC 2617 requires the client to echo it back unchanged. This was causing
INVITE auth to fail with 407 after successful REGISTER.

Also adds debug logging for INVITE auth challenges.

commit.message:
Add Figma Plugin with full UI workflow

Features:
- Complete Figma plugin with 6-screen UI
- Epic selection and JIRA project configuration
- Layer scanning and semantic name suggestions
- Interactive suggestion review with checkboxes
- Actual layer renaming via Figma Plugin API
- Validation with duplicate detection
- Lokalise export integration
- JIRA ticket auto-creation
- Backend API server for Lokalise/JIRA communication

Plugin structure:
- manifest.json: Plugin configuration
- code.js: Main plugin logic (runs in Figma sandbox)
- ui.html: 6-screen workflow UI
- server.js: Backend Express API
- README.md: Setup and usage instructions

This completes the full POC as designed in the UI mockups.

commit.message:
Fix activity feed: direct SQLite query bypasses connection cache

The feed API returned empty despite 120+ entries in the DB.
Root cause: the web route's DatabaseService instance couldn't see
data written by the orchestrator's instance, likely due to SQLite
connection caching within the same process.

Fix: feed endpoint now opens a direct sqlite3 connection to the
DB file, bypassing the DatabaseService abstraction entirely. This
guarantees it always sees the latest committed data.

commit.message:
Add join/leave room commands and start/stop convenience commands

Room state now lives in daemon memory. `join [name]` sets the current room,
`leave` tears down all shares and clears it. Share commands auto-join a
random room if not already in one. `start`/`stop` delegate to systemctl.
Removes --room flag from share commands.
